# cluster.yaml reference

Topology + hardened-posture configuration for an Pandion cluster (apiVersion pandion/v1).

Validate a file with `pandion validate -f cluster.yaml`; scaffold a starter with `pandion init --cluster`.

## Top-level fields

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `apiVersion` | const `pandion/v1` | yes | — | Schema version. Unknown versions are rejected. |
| `defaults` | — | no | — | — |
| `firewall` | [`firewall`](#firewall) | no | — | — |
| `lifecycle` | [`lifecycle`](#lifecycle) | no | — | — |
| `name` | string | yes | pattern `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{1,40}$` | Cluster name; combined with a run-id to form the pandion-cluster-id tag. |
| `nodes` | [`node`](#node)[] | yes | — | — |
| `provider` | [`provider`](#provider) | no | — | — |

## `firewall`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `extra_public_ingress` | object[] | no | — | — |
| `public_ingress` | const `deny-all` | no | `deny-all` | — |
| `ssh` | object | no | — | — |

## `firewall` → `extra_public_ingress`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `from` | string | yes | — | Explicit source CIDR. Triggers a warning. |
| `port` | [`portSpec`](#portspec) | yes | — | — |

## `firewall` → `ssh`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `over` | `overlay` \| `public` | no | `overlay` | — |

## `lifecycle`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `confirm_teardown` | boolean | no | `true` | — |
| `destroy_on_exit` | boolean | no | `false` | — |
| `keep_on_failure` | boolean | no | `false` | — |

## `node`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `egress_allow` | string[] | no | — | Per-node egress entries merged with defaults.security.egress_allow. |
| `ipc_ports` | [`portSpec`](#portspec)[] | no | — | Ports this node LISTENS on; allowed only between cluster members. |
| `name` | string | yes | pattern `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,40}$` | — |
| `needs_caps` | [`capName`](#capname)[] | no | — | Capabilities added back on top of the drop-all default. Auditable. |
| `privileged_ports` | [`portSpec`](#portspec)[] | no | — | Low ports (<1024); Pandion grants ONLY CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE for these. |
| `role` | string | no | — | Free-form role label (broker, worker, ...). |
| `run` | string | no | — | User-defined run command (the §5 contract). Optional: omit it to DEPLOY the node (provision + sync + build) without launching anything — start it later with `pandion start`. |

## `nodeCommon`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `container_image` | string | no | — | — |
| `engine` | `docker` \| `native` | no | `native` | — |
| `gpu` | string | no | — | GPU model[:count], e.g. a100 or h100:2; empty = CPU |
| `image` | string | no | — | — |
| `security` | [`security`](#security) | no | — | — |
| `setup` | string[] | no | — | Shell commands run on the node (as root) in the egress-open build window, for software apt can't install (pip/npm/cargo, a vendor repo, a curl'd binary). Defaults' setup runs first, then the node's own; each command must succeed. |
| `size` | string | no | — | — |
| `sync` | [`sync`](#sync) | no | — | — |
| `target` | `cloud` \| `local` | no | `cloud` | — |
| `toolchain` | [`toolchain`](#toolchain) | no | — | — |
| `ttl` | — | no | `60m` | — |

## `provider`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `credential` | string | no | — | Name of a credential in the local secret store. NEVER the token itself. |
| `name` | `hetzner` \| `digitalocean` \| `vultr` \| `linode` \| `scaleway` \| `lambda` \| `mock` | yes | — | — |
| `private_network` | object | no | — | — |
| `region` | string | no | — | — |

## `provider` → `private_network`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `cidr` | string | no | — | e.g. 10.10.0.0/24 |

## `security`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `audit_log` | boolean | no | `true` | — |
| `block_metadata_service` | boolean | no | `true` | — |
| `capabilities` | — | no | `drop-all` | — |
| `egress_allow` | string[] | no | — | Outbound allowlist on top of always-on provider-API + overlay peers. |
| `encrypt_volumes` | boolean | no | `true` | — |
| `open_egress_during_build` | boolean | no | `true` | — |
| `overlay` | — | no | `auto` | Overlay: 'auto' (default L3 WireGuard), false (NOT recommended), 'l2' (add a safe Layer-2 segment), or { l2: { profile: safe\|lab, subnet, vni } }. |
| `run_as` | string | no | `pandion-run` | Unprivileged run user. |

## `sync`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `build` | string | no | — | Remote build command (source mode only). |
| `mode` | `source` \| `binaries` | no | `source` | — |
| `path` | string | no | `./` | — |
| `remote_path` | string | no | — | — |

## `toolchain`

| field | type | required | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `no_default` | boolean | no | — | Install ONLY the packages above, omitting Pandion's built-in C++ toolchain (a minimal node). Default false. |
| `packages` | string[] | no | — | Extra apt packages/libraries to install (e.g. libzmq3-dev, or version-pinned gcc=4:13.2.0-7ubuntu1). ADDED to the built-in C++ toolchain and installed in the egress-open build window. |
